scripts.dev: npm run build -w @kpl/shared && npm run dev -w @kpl/web
scripts.dev:legacy: npm run build -w @kpl/shared && npm run build -w @kpl/web && npm run dev -w @kpl/server
scripts.preview:web: npm run build:vercel && npm run preview -w @kpl/web -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 4300
scripts.build: npm run build -w @kpl/shared && npm run build -w @kpl/server && npm run build -w @kpl/web
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build -w @kpl/shared && npm run build -w @kpl/web
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
